overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring the Hiyoshi Springs area. The character ascends wooden walkways through a bamboo forest, passes through a traditional red gate, and walks alongside turquoise hot spring pools with rising steam under an overcast, stormy sky.

agents.ego_description: samurai character jogging up wooden stairs through dense bamboo forest with rocky cliff to the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a raised walkway through the forest
tall green bamboo stalks lining the left side of the path
moss-covered stone cliff wall on the right side of the path
traditional Japanese torii-style gate with red painted beams at the top of the stairs
traditional stone tōrō lantern beside the path

segments.scene_description: The samurai ascends a wooden stairway through a dense bamboo grove, with a rocky cliff face on the right and traditional architecture visible ahead. The path leads upward toward a red wooden gate structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hot springs terrace with turquoise pools

events.description: passes through red wooden gate into the open Hiyoshi Springs area
steam rising from turquoise hot springs becomes visible as the character approaches the pools

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate and approaching the steaming hot spring pools with turquoise water

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on rocks beside the hot spring water
person walking along the wooden path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: turquoise-colored thermal pool with steam rising from the surface
white steam rising from the hot springs creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Passing through the red wooden gate, the scene opens into a wide terrace overlooking turquoise hot spring pools. Steam rises from the water as the character walks forward, passing villagers sitting by the springs and stone lanterns lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway along hot spring edge

events.description: character slows to a walk while passing seated villagers by the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the steaming turquoise pool on wooden walkways

notable_agents.action: villager crouching by the water's edge near the wooden walkway

entered.detail: massive twisted pine tree with gnarled branches extending over the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the edge of the hot springs, with the turquoise water now on the right. A large gnarled tree appears ahead on the right, while bamboo groves line the left. A villager crouches by the water's edge as the character passes.

scene_state.functional_zone: bamboo forest path with twisted pine

events.description: passes under the low-hanging branches of the large twisted tree
path becomes darker as storm clouds thicken overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wooden path through dense bamboo forest

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser section of bamboo forest, passing under the canopy of the large twisted tree. A wooden fence appears on the right as the hot springs disappear from view behind the vegetation. The atmosphere grows darker as storm clouds gather overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded bamboo ascent into a steaming hot spring terrace before descending back into a darkening forest. It begins with the samurai climbing a wooden stairway through a dense bamboo grove and rocky cliffs, moving steadily toward a distant red wooden gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the scene opens into a wide terrace where steam rises from turquoise hot spring pools lined with stone lanterns and resting villagers. The path then continues along the edge of the water, passing a crouching villager and a large gnarled tree, before the landscape shifts back into a dense canopy of bamboo. Finally, the hot springs disappear behind a wooden fence as the camera moves under the twisted branches of the great tree while storm clouds gather overhead, casting the environment into a darker mood.
